So we have them separated so that when you are working with a client you can send them specific reviews that they hit home more to them. You know, so if they're a large automobile corporation, you know you want to send over similar reviews from a large automobile corporations if they're a small one. They're only going to be interested in what other small companies are saying that's the whole amplifier to social proof.
